title: Arrestor (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Arrestor''''' was the name of two known [[Starship/Legends|starships]] throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] history:

*'''''[[Arrestor (Acclamator-class)|Arrestor]]''''', an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] that fought for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and later the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].
*'''''[[Arrestor (Neutron Star-class)|Arrestor]]''''', a [[Neutron Star-class bulk cruiser/Legends|''Neutron Star''-class bulk cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].
*'''''[[Cantwell-class Arrestor Cruiser]]''''', a type of cruiser used by the [[Galactic Empire]].

{{Disambig}}
